name: ReShade Quality — Ambient Occlusion + SSR (DX11)
author: igwtech / Neocron Community
description: Depth-based ambient occlusion (qUINT MXAO) and screen-space reflections (qUINT SSR) layered on the base ReShade addon, with a Quality preset that also keeps the base clarity/sharpen pass. Uses the DX11 client's existing depth buffer — if AO looks flat or inverted, open the ReShade overlay (Home) and check DisplayDepth, then flip the depth options (see README).
